description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The facade features a mix of white and blue-gray panels, with large floor-to-ceiling windows on the front, allowing for ample natural light. A single-car garage is attached to the left side, and a wooden walkway leads to the main entrance, which is recessed and framed by vertical blue-gray siding. The landscaping in front includes small shrubs and decorative stones, enhancing the curb appeal. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing privacy. The overall structure is boxy and streamlined, characteristic of contemporary urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white and blue-gray exterior panels. Features include a single-car garage, wooden walkway, and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, garage, and landscaped walkway.
description_view_1: Side view with a mostly solid white wall, a single window, and minimal architectural detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more windows, a secondary door, and the blue-gray central section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two large windows and the garage volume extending outward.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with vertical siding, wooden walkway, and minimal landscaping
